codeReview.summary: GTK4 installation and basic window test were successful. However, the feature claims to fulfill VAL-BUILD-003 which requires all Linux libraries (libghostty, WebKit2GTK, libnotify, D-Bus), but only GTK4 was verified. The other libraries are not installed in this environment.

issues.description: Feature claims to fulfill VAL-BUILD-003 ('All required Linux libraries (libghostty, WebKit2GTK, libnotify, D-Bus) are available'), but only GTK4 was verified. WebKit2GTK, libnotify, and D-Bus are NOT installed (verified: pkg-config returns 'not found' for webkit2gtk-4.1, libnotify, dbus-1). This validation criterion should be moved to a separate feature or the feature scope should be corrected.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The AGENTS.md in the mission directory documents the expected build commands for checking dependencies including 'pkg-config --modversion webkitgtk-6.0', but the worker did not verify these other libraries.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md lists 'pkg-config --modversion webkitgtk-6.0' as a build command to check, but only GTK4 was verified in this feature

summary: The GTK4 setup was successful: libgtk-4-dev (v4.14.5) was installed, test application compiled, and window displayed on X11 desktop. However, the feature incorrectly claims to fulfill VAL-BUILD-003 which requires all Linux libraries (libghostty, WebKit2GTK, libnotify, D-Bus). Only GTK4 was verified - the other three libraries are not installed. The validation criterion assignment should be corrected.
